description: Enterprise backup and recovery technologies covering encrypted backups, immutable storage, air-gapped copies, and ransomware resilience strategies.

strategies.description: 3 copies of data, on 2 different media types, with 1 copy offsite
3-2-1 plus 1 immutable or air-gapped copy, with 0 errors (verified recovery)
Real-time replication capturing every change for near-zero RPO

immutabilityOptions.description: Write Once Read Many — hardware or software enforced
immutabilityOptions.vendors: NetApp SnapLock, Dell EMC Compliance Mode
AWS S3 Object Lock, Azure Immutable Blob, GCP Bucket Lock

immutabilityOptions.description: Physically isolated backup media disconnected from network
Backup integrity verified via blockchain hash anchoring

vendorLandscape.strengths: Immutable backups, ransomware detection, broad platform support
Enterprise backup, cloud-native protection, compliance features
Zero-trust data security, immutable by design, ransomware recovery

detection: Anomaly detection on backup data patterns (encryption, compression changes)

malaysianContext.bnmRmit: BNM RMiT S10.62-S10.64 require encrypted backups, offline/air-gapped copies for critical systems, and regular recovery testing.
considerations: Data residency — backup copies stored within Malaysia for regulated data
Recovery site within acceptable distance for operational resilience
